final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: shop background for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate merchant shop background for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Scene/backdrop: cozy underground merchant stall carved into stone, shelves of relics, scrolls, glowing bottles, treasure chest display, warm lamps. Subject: environment only, no merchant character, no UI, no text. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game background, clean fantasy shop art. Composition/framing: vertical mobile-friendly background with clear safe zones for shop offer cards and shared HUD, no clutter in central offer area. Lighting/mood: warm, inviting, slightly mysterious. Color palette: warm gold, amber lanterns, dark stone, muted purple cloth, small elemental color accents. Constraints: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no characters, no UI overlays, no casino imagery, no gore.
